title: citrus albida
intro: Citrus albida, also known as the White Citrus or Yuzu, is a small, evergreen tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, derived from its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Citrus albida include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Citrus albida include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as colds, flu, and digestive problems.
